title: Executive Order 7807—Power-Site Restoration No. 486, Oregon. Partial Revocation of Executive Order of April 28, 1917, Creating Power-Site Reserve No. 621
text:
By virtue of and pursuant to the authority vested in me by the act of June 25, 1910, 36 Stat., 847, as amended by the act of August 24, 1912, 37 Stat., 497, the Executive Order of April 28, 1917, creating Power-Site Reserve No. 621, is hereby revoked as to the following-described lands:
WILLAMETTE MERIDIAN
T. 35 S., R. 11 W., Sec. 7, SE¼SE¼.
FRANKLIN D. ROOSEVELT
The White House,
February 8, 1938.
